_comment: Codex CLI v0.131.0-alpha.4 approval-modal shapes captured live via tmux capture-pane (Phase 0a gate). All modals share one structure; parser anchors on it.
footerHints: Press enter to confirm or esc to cancel

answerKeystrokes.byNumber: send the option's digit then Enter
answerKeystrokes.byShortcut: send the parenthetical char (e.g. y / p / a / esc)
answerKeystrokes.byArrows: Up/Down to move the › highlight, then Enter

modals.heading: Do you trust the contents of this directory?
Would you like to run the following command?

options.label: Yes, and don't ask again for commands that start with `<cmd>`
No, and tell Codex what to do differently

modals.footer: Press enter to confirm or esc to cancel
modals.resolvedLine: ✔ You approved codex to run <cmd> this time

modals.heading: Would you like to make the following edits?

options.label: Yes, and don't ask again for these files
No, and tell Codex what to do differently

modals.footer: Press enter to confirm or esc to cancel
